'''Nivek'Yppiks''' was a [[Order of the Ffib|Ffib]] heretic. He was wanted by his Ffib "brothers" for his heresy.

[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] captured Nivek and was awarded with 500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from the [[Order of the Ffib]].
